backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the XpertLab backend, defining all core data types (Hospital, Test, Booking, HospitalSample, Report, AuditLog, etc.) and composing storage, authorization, and migration mixins into a single deployable canister.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (which included an `assignedHospitals` map) into the new state shape by dropping that field and retaining only the `assignments` map.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, setting the XpertLab title, theme color, and mounting the React root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with three lazy-loaded routes (/, /patient-app, /staff-app), wrapped in ErrorBoundary, ThemeProvider, and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddHospita: A modal dialog form for adding a new hospital, using react-hook-form for validation and the useAddHospital mutation hook to submit data.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddTestMod: A modal dialog form for adding a new lab test, handling duplicate code errors via react-hook-form and the useAddTest mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/DisableTes: An alert dialog that confirms disabling a test, calling the useDisableTest mutation and showing toast feedback on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/admin/EditHospit: A modal dialog form for editing an existing hospital's details, pre-populating fields from the hospital prop and submitting via the useUpdateHospital mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/EditTestMo: A modal dialog form for editing an existing lab test, pre-populating fields from the test prop and submitting updates via the useUpdateTest mutation with duplicate code error handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: A full-screen login page that displays app features and a sign-in button using Internet Identity authentication via the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/PatientLogi: Renders the patient-facing login screen with Internet Identity authentication, a hero banner, feature highlights, and a role-error notice if a staff account is detected.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name, phone, and (for staff) role, then saves the profile to the backend via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/StaffLoginS: Renders the staff portal login screen with Internet Identity sign-in and optional demo-mode buttons for phlebotomist, lab admin, and super admin roles.
frontend/src/components/demo/MockBottomN: A presentational bottom navigation bar used in demo/preview contexts that renders nav items with Lucide icons and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/demo/RolePermiss: Displays a static permissions matrix table showing which modules (book tests, reports, attendance, etc.) are accessible by each app role.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Top-level page layout component providing a sticky header with the logo and an optional floating bottom navigation bar for route switching.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Fixed bottom navigation bar that dynamically resolves Lucide icon names, highlights the active route, and supports badge counts on nav items.
frontend/src/components/layout/Notificat: Bell icon button that shows an unread-count badge and toggles the NotificationDrawer when clicked.
A slide-in drawer component that displays a list of notifications with type-based icons, relative timestamps, and a 'mark all read' action using the useNotifications hook.
frontend/src/components/layout/PatientAp: A patient-facing app shell with a sticky header showing the logo and a floating bottom navigation bar that highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/layout/RoleGuard: A guard component that renders children only if the user's role is in the allowed list, otherwise showing an 'Access Denied' message or a custom fallback.
frontend/src/components/layout/ShiftGuar: A guard component for phlebotomist routes that blocks rendering with a loading spinner until authentication and actor are ready, showing an auth-required message if no identity is found.
frontend/src/components/layout/StaffAppL: A staff-facing app shell with a sticky header, optional demo-mode banner, bottom navigation, and automatic badge count injection for the home-collection-queue nav item.
frontend/src/components/shared/DeliveryM: A modal dialog that lets users select a report delivery method (WhatsApp, Physical, Email, or Hospital Pickup) via a radio group before confirming.
frontend/src/components/shared/ErrorBoun: A React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and displays a styled fallback UI with reload and reset options.
frontend/src/components/shared/GradientB: A reusable button component supporting primary gradient and outline variants, multiple sizes, and an optional loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSc: A full-screen loading indicator with an animated logo and bouncing dots that switches to a timeout error UI if loading exceeds a configurable duration.
frontend/src/components/shared/MedicalCa: A simple styled card wrapper component with optional click handler and hover animation support.
frontend/src/components/shared/SampleAct: Renders role-aware action buttons (Mark Dispatched, View/Download Report, Share via WhatsApp, Mark Delivered) for a hospital sample based on its current status and the user's role. Opens delivery method and WhatsApp confirmation dialogs as needed.
frontend/src/components/shared/SampleWor: Displays a vertical step-by-step timeline of the six hospital sample workflow stages, visually distinguishing completed, current, and future stages with icons and connector lines.
frontend/src/components/shared/Searchabl: Provides a searchable, toggleable list of lab tests with name/description filtering, selection state management, and a summary of selected tests and their total price.
frontend/src/components/shared/StatusBad: Renders a styled pill badge for a given status string (booking, incident severity, home collection, or hospital sample statuses), falling back to a gray badge for unknown values.
frontend/src/components/shared/WhatsAppS: An alert dialog that asks the user to confirm sharing a lab report via WhatsApp, showing patient name and test list, with demo-mode awareness and a loading state on the confirm button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializes access control with an admin token, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Fetches the current user's role from the backend actor and returns a minimal UserProfile, exposing combined loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom React hook that manages an in-memory notifications list with support for adding, marking all read, removing, and clearing notifications, capped at 20 entries.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, tests, bookings, samples, hospitals, and more.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins/Inter fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, and defines reusable component utility classes like premium-card, btn-gradient, and glass-nav.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a single `cn` helper that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAttendance: Admin page that displays currently active phlebotomist shifts with live elapsed-time tracking and a filterable shift history list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin page for viewing and filtering all bookings by status or search term, with the ability to update booking statuses via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminHospitalSa: Admin page for viewing and managing all hospital samples, supporting search/filter by delivery method, billing edits, and workflow actions (dispatch, deliver, WhatsApp confirmation) via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page that lists all lab reports with search by ID or booking, and provides view/download actions for each report PDF.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AuditLogsPage.t: Admin page displaying audit log entries with filtering by status (success, rejected, suspicious), search, and mock data fallback when the backend returns no results.
Admin form page for creating a health camp with name, date, and location, storing it in localStorage and displaying a generated QR code and camp ID upon creation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HospitalDetails: Admin page showing details of a specific hospital and managing phlebotomist assignments, including assigning new phlebotomists and removing existing ones with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HospitalManagem: Admin page for listing, searching, adding, editing, and disabling hospitals with client-side pagination and role-based controls for superAdmin vs labAdmin.
frontend/src/pages/admin/IncidentsPage.t: Admin page that fetches and displays all incidents with severity-based filtering (low/medium/high) and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SecurityLogsPag: Admin page for viewing security logs with user ID and event-type filters, plus a confirmation dialog to reset device bindings.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestManagementP: Admin page for managing lab tests with search, pagination, CSV bulk upload, per-row active/inactive toggling, and add/edit/disable modals.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UploadReportPag: Staff page for uploading a PDF lab report tied to a booking ID and patient ID, with upload progress tracking and success state.
frontend/src/pages/AppSelectorPage.tsx: Landing page that displays a hero banner and portal selection cards allowing users to navigate to either the Patient App or Staff App.
frontend/src/pages/demo/RBACDemoPage.tsx: Demo page that visualizes role-based access control by letting users switch between app roles and see corresponding navigation previews and a permissions matrix.
Patient-facing page for browsing and selecting diagnostic tests with search/filter, displaying test details and price, and proceeding to slot selection with chosen tests.
frontend/src/pages/patient/HomeCollectio: Multi-step form page allowing patients to request home sample collection by entering an address (with GPS support), selecting tests, choosing a time slot, and submitting the request.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyBookingsPag: Displays a sorted list of the patient's test bookings with status badges, test names, and slot times, with a link to book a new test if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHomeCollect: Displays the patient's home collection requests sorted by date, showing address, selected tests, time slot, and status badge for each request.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHospitalSam: Shows the patient's hospital lab samples with expandable rows that reveal a workflow timeline, supporting both live backend data and demo mode samples.
Placeholder vitals page showing empty-state messaging and static cards for blood pressure and blood glucose, awaiting data recorded by a phlebotomist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/PatientHomePa: Patient dashboard home page displaying a personalized welcome banner, a grid of quick-action cards, and shortcuts to bookings and home collections.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ProfilePage.t: Patient/user profile page that displays user info, role badge, and assigned hospitals, with support for superAdmin viewing a phlebotomist's profile and removing hospital assignments.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ReportsPage.t: Displays a sorted list of the patient's lab reports fetched via useGetMyReports, with view and download links for each report file.
frontend/src/pages/patient/SlotSelection: Allows a patient to select a time slot for their chosen tests and confirm a booking, showing a summary of selected tests and total price.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/AddHospi: Form page for a phlebotomist to record a hospital sample collection, including hospital selection (filtered to assigned hospitals), patient details, test selection with quantities, and payment info.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Attendan: Phlebotomist attendance/shift management page that shows today's summary stats (samples, cash, UPI, pending) and provides start/end shift actions with a locked end-of-shift summary view.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/HomeColl: Displays the phlebotomist's daily home collection queue with a status overview card and individual collection cards supporting status transitions (Assigned → En Route → Sample Collected → Completed) and Google Maps navigation.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/MyHospit: Displays a list of hospital samples for a phlebotomist, supporting both demo and live backend modes, with actions to mark samples as dispatched, delivered, or WhatsApp-confirmed, and expandable workflow timeline per sample.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Implements a multi-step attendance/shift tracking page for phlebotomists that captures GPS location verification, selfie capture, and shift start/end recording with mock-location detection.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/RecordVi: Provides a tabbed form page for phlebotomists to record blood pressure (systolic, diastolic, pulse) and blood glucose (RBS) readings by submitting to backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/ScanCamp: Renders a QR code scanner page using the device camera to log camp check-ins, displaying a live video preview with scan overlay, results list, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/TaskQueu: Shows a refreshable task queue for phlebotomists listing pending hospital bookings and assigned home collection requests fetched from the backend, with an empty state and last-updated timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/staff/SubmitIncidentP: A React page component that allows staff to submit incident reports with a severity selector, description textarea, optional photo upload, and displays a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/PatientApp.tsx: Patient-facing app shell that handles Internet Identity authentication, profile setup, and client-side routing across all patient pages (home, book test, reports, vitals, profile, etc.) using a custom `onNavigate` pattern.
frontend/src/StaffApp.tsx: Staff-facing app shell that handles authentication, role detection (phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin), dynamic bottom-nav generation, and lazy-loaded routing to all staff and admin pages.
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Defines core TypeScript interfaces and types for the XpertLab app, including AppRole, Test, UserProfile, HomeCollectionRequest, HospitalSample, SampleStatus, and DeliveryMethod.
frontend/src/utils/deliveryHelpers.ts: Provides helper functions that map SampleStatus and DeliveryMethod values to Tailwind CSS color classes and human-readable description strings.
frontend/src/utils/demoData.ts: Manages demo mode data using localStorage, providing CRUD utilities for demo hospital samples and home collections, including seeding, status updates, and reset functions.
frontend/src/utils/deviceFingerprint.ts: Generates and persists a unique device ID in localStorage, and parses the user agent string to extract OS version and browser/device model for device fingerprinting.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports formatting utility functions for Indian Rupee currency, dates, times, relative timestamps, unique ID generation, and a premium two-line time display for home collection cards.
frontend/src/utils/geoHelpers.ts: Provides GPS utility functions including accuracy validation, Haversine distance calculation, mock/spoofed location detection, geofence checking, and implausible speed-jump detection.
frontend/src/utils/roleConfig.ts: Defines the navigation item configuration for each AppRole (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin), mapping roles to their respective nav labels, paths, and icons.
frontend/src/utils/roleHelpers.ts: Exports boolean predicate functions for checking AppRole values and a getRoleDisplayName function that returns a human-readable role label.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, shadows, gradients, and keyframe animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking four pending feature requests related to phlebotomist-hospital assignment backend logic, area-matching, hospital management UI, and assignment wiring.
